items.title: SGA: Plug&Play Geometric Verification for Educational Video Synthesis
items.originalTitle: SGA: Plug&Play Geometric Verification for Educational Video Synthesis
items.summary: Recent work leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate executable code for pedagogical animations using libraries such as Manim. However, ensuring spatial correctness and visual legibility remains challenging, as existing frameworks emphasize pedagogical content while overlooking geometric occlusions. We propose the Symbolic Geometric Agent (SGA), a plug-and-play module for code-centric animation pipelines that intercepts LLM-generated code, performs partial execution to extract symbolic scene graphs, and…

items.title: The Many Senses of Visual Similarity: A Text-Prompted Image Perceptual Metric
items.originalTitle: The Many Senses of Visual Similarity: A Text-Prompted Image Perceptual Metric
items.summary: Human visual similarity judgments are context-dependent. For example, two images may be similar in shape but distinct in color. Existing perceptual similarity metrics, however, collapse these nuances into a single scalar value, offering no mechanism to condition on specific aspects. To bridge this gap, we introduce a large-scale dataset of human similarity judgments over image triplets, where each triplet is annotated across multiple, free-form semantic aspects of similarity. Benchmarking a broad range of frontier…

items.title: Simple Domain Generalization for Strong Pixel-Level Image Tampering Detection in Modern VLMs
items.originalTitle: Simple Domain Generalization for Strong Pixel-Level Image Tampering Detection in Modern VLMs
items.summary: Modern vision-language models (VLMs) have significantly improved image generation and editing capabilities, making pixel-level image tampering detection increasingly important yet challenging under cross-model and out-of-distribution shifts. This work studies domain generalization for pixel-level image tampering detection in modern VLMs like ChatGPT, Gemini, Qwen-Image, etc., aiming to learn tampering localization models that remain robust across diverse VLM-generated manipulation distributions. We propose a simpl…

items.title: GigaPath-Flash and GigaTIME-Flash: Efficient Pathology Foundation Models for Whole-Slide and Tumor Microenvironment Analysis
items.originalTitle: GigaPath-Flash and GigaTIME-Flash: Efficient Pathology Foundation Models for Whole-Slide and Tumor Microenvironment Analysis
items.summary: Foundation models have emerged as a driving force in computational pathology, with the potential to transform cancer diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment selection by learning transferable representations from large-scale histopathology data. A growing landscape of pathology foundation models now spans diverse data sources, architectures, and downstream applications. However, most pretrained models operate only at the image-tile level, use restrictive licenses, and remain computationally expensive, limiting large-s…

items.title: Three-Body Scattering for Generative Modeling
items.originalTitle: Three-Body Scattering for Generative Modeling
items.summary: Modern generative models typically rely on an adversarial critic, a prescribed noise-to-data path, or an autoregressive factorization. Instead, we show that a proper distributional energy can induce sample-level motion and provide direct regression supervision for a one-step generator. Three-Body Scattering Modeling (TBSM) for generation turns the energy distance into a constant-size per-projectile interaction: each projectile is attracted toward one real source and repelled from one independently generated source…

items.title: Certified Training for Convolutional Perturbations
items.originalTitle: Certified Training for Convolutional Perturbations
items.summary: Vision models have been found to be susceptible to perturbations such as motion blur induced at runtime by a shaking camera. This impedes their deployment in critical applications since phenomena such as slightly blurred vision might lead to failures, for example an object detector missing objects. While methods such as data augmentation or Adversarial Training can improve empirical robustness, they lack formal safety guarantees, making it difficult to identify and mitigate hidden vulnerabilities. We introduce a n…

items.title: O-VAD: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection through Object-Centric Tracking and Reasoning
items.originalTitle: O-VAD: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection through Object-Centric Tracking and Reasoning
items.summary: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection (IVAD) aims to identify anomalous objects and events in an industrial process, which is crucial for modern manufacturing and quality control systems. Existing VLM-based anomaly reasoning methods are capable of detecting open-ended anomalies in general domains. However, their performance declines in industrial settings characterized by intricate object transformations, strict physics, and procedural constraints. To tackle the complexity of such interaction-intensive detection, we…

items.title: Empowering On-Device Model Adaptation with an Edge AI Inference Accelerator
items.originalTitle: Empowering On-Device Model Adaptation with an Edge AI Inference Accelerator
items.summary: On-device model adaptation is essential to enable lifelong personalization on resource-constrained hardware, but compute, power, and memory limitations of such devices make end-to-end backpropagation impractical for modern deep neural networks. This work proposes a heterogeneous adaptation pipeline that repurposes a commercial edge AI inference accelerator, Hailo-8L, for frozen-backbone feature extraction during on-device training. The computational graph is partitioned so that the pre-trained backbone is quantize…

items.title: SciForma: Structure-Faithful Generation of Scientific Diagrams
items.originalTitle: SciForma: Structure-Faithful Generation of Scientific Diagrams
items.summary: Structural fidelity is essential to scientific methodology diagrams. To communicate research logic, these diagrams must faithfully render components, directional relations, and textual annotations. Since a single error, such as a reversed arrow or an unreadable equation, can invalidate the entire figure, structural fidelity is inherently conjunctive: correctness on one axis cannot compensate for failure on another. Current open-source models fail to satisfy this criterion. Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) learns plaus…

items.title: The Label Complexity of Class-Conditional Coverage under Distribution Shift
items.originalTitle: The Label Complexity of Class-Conditional Coverage under Distribution Shift
items.summary: Standard evaluation of many recognition systems contains distribution shift by construction, since benchmarks place disjoint conditions in the training and test splits. Under such a shift, split conformal prediction keeps marginal coverage near the nominal level while per-class coverage fails silently: on a real cross-subject skeleton benchmark, marginal coverage stays near ninety percent, the worst action class is covered about seventy percent of the time, and ten of the sixty classes fall below eighty percent co…

items.title: 稀疏证据足以：多模态视频虚假信息检测中的代理证据搜寻
items.originalTitle: Sparse Evidence Can Suffice: Agentic Evidence Seeking for Multimodal Video Misinformation Detection
items.summary: 本文提出SIEVE框架，将证据获取与验证解耦，通过代理主动搜寻稀疏的决策相关线索，并基于紧凑证据包进行真实性判断。实验表明SIEVE在多个视频虚假信息基准上优于基线方法，且提供可检查的证据追踪。
items.abstract: Multimodal video misinformation detection is commonly formulated as a holistic video-understanding task, where the entire video and its associated content are processed and judged in a single pass. However, real-world misinformation often exhibits a sparse and compositional evidence structure: a reliable decision may depend on only a few coupled clues, while most video content contributes limited additional information. Exhaustive multimodal reasoning may therefore introduce substantial redundancy and obscure deci…
keyFacts: 如何利用稀疏证据结构进行多模态视频虚假信息检测？
提出SIEVE框架，包含证据搜寻代理和验证器，代理使用有监督证据搜寻轨迹和证据感知强化学习训练。
SIEVE在多个视频虚假信息基准上持续优于基线方法，并支持使用紧凑证据包进行可靠验证。
items.why: 该研究与人工智能相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。

items.findings: SIEVE在多个视频虚假信息基准上持续优于基线方法，并支持使用紧凑证据包进行可靠验证。

items.title: UniETP：面向通用具身任务规划的环境统一
items.originalTitle: UniETP: Unifying Environments for Generalizable Embodied Task Planning
items.summary: 本文提出UniETP，一个统一接口，整合四个常用模拟器（AI2-THOR、VirtualHome、Habitat、BEHAVIOR），实现标准化的观测和动作空间，并构建了多难度级别的数据集。实验评估了近期模型的具身规划能力并分析了性能瓶颈。
items.abstract: This paper focuses on the problem of Embodied Task Planning, where an agent is required to execute a sequence of atomic actions within an interactive environment to complete a user-specified task. Though a variety of simulators and datasets have previously been built for this task, these efforts are largely isolated, with each using its own observation format, action type, and task domain. This fragmentation complicates comprehensive model evaluation and hinders the scalability of training data. As an effort towar…
keyFacts: 如何解决不同模拟器环境不统一导致的具身任务规划泛化性不足问题？
提出UniETP统一接口，整合四个模拟器，标准化观测和动作空间，并自动构建多难度数据集。
在提出的基准上进行了广泛实验，评估了近期模型的具身规划能力并分析了性能瓶颈。
items.why: 该研究与机器人与无人系统相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。

items.method: 提出UniETP统一接口，整合四个模拟器，标准化观测和动作空间，并自动构建多难度数据集。
items.findings: 在提出的基准上进行了广泛实验，评估了近期模型的具身规划能力并分析了性能瓶颈。

items.title: 基于异构数据集的SAR船舶检测与总吨位估计用于暗船识别
items.originalTitle: SAR Vessel Detection and Gross Tonnage Estimation from Heterogeneous Datasets for Dark Vessel Identification
items.summary: 本文提出一个框架，结合多任务深度学习预测船舶位置、类型和物理尺寸，再通过KNN非参数模型从尺寸和类别回归总吨位(GT)，从而识别暗船。实验表明该方法在多任务上达到与现有单任务模型相当的性能。
items.abstract: Detecting vessels engaging in illegal activities is of paramount importance for maritime security. One of the major goals is to detect dark vessels, ships that disable their transponders to evade surveillance. Deep Learning (DL) models can detect vessels in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images, enabling maritime traffic analysis regardless of weather or visibility conditions. However, to detect potential dark vessels, a DL model must select only those that are required to carry a transponder based on their Gross…
keyFacts: 如何利用异构图像和表格数据集实现SAR图像中的船舶检测和总吨位回归？
结合多任务深度学习框架（检测位置、类型、尺寸）和基于KNN的非参数GT回归模型。
该方法能够预测多个输出，并在各个子任务上与最新模型保持竞争力，从而支持暗船识别。
items.why: 该研究与计算机视觉相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。
items.peerReviewStatus: 预印本 · 未经 arXiv 同行评审
items.question: 如何利用异构图像和表格数据集实现SAR图像中的船舶检测和总吨位回归？
items.method: 结合多任务深度学习框架（检测位置、类型、尺寸）和基于KNN的非参数GT回归模型。
items.findings: 该方法能够预测多个输出，并在各个子任务上与最新模型保持竞争力，从而支持暗船识别。

items.title: 先预测后行动：未来状态条件下的视觉语言导航
items.originalTitle: Anticipate Before Acting: Future-State-Conditioned Vision-Language Navigation
items.summary: 本文提出FSC-VLN，通过添加未来查询令牌，在训练时将其隐藏状态与未来视觉嵌入对齐，从而在不使用未来图像的情况下利用未来信息。在R2R val-unseen上，FSC-VLN提升了SR/OSR/SPL指标，尤其在长序列中。
items.abstract: End-to-end vision-language navigation (VLN) with causal vision-language models can map instructions and egocentric observations directly to actions, but standard behavior cloning supervises only the next action and does not explicitly train the policy state to be predictive of future visual outcomes. We first ask a diagnostic question: if the policy is given an expert-trajectory future image as privileged input at training and testing time, is that additional visual evidence useful for choosing the current action?…
keyFacts: 在视觉语言导航中，如何在不依赖未来图像的情况下利用未来信息辅助当前决策？
提出FSC-VLN，添加未来查询令牌，在训练时通过目标分支将其隐藏状态对齐到未来Δ步的视觉嵌入，推理时移除该分支。
在R2R val-unseen上，FSC-VLN在两种训练数据设置下均优于基线，且在长序列上提升更大。
items.why: 该研究与人工智能相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。
items.peerReviewStatus: 预印本 · 未经 arXiv 同行评审

items.method: 提出FSC-VLN，添加未来查询令牌，在训练时通过目标分支将其隐藏状态对齐到未来Δ步的视觉嵌入，推理时移除该分支。
items.findings: 在R2R val-unseen上，FSC-VLN在两种训练数据设置下均优于基线，且在长序列上提升更大。

items.title: HOMIE：通过多模态智能增强的人-物中心视频个性化
items.originalTitle: HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enchancement
items.summary: 本文提出HOMIE框架，统一处理主体间和主体内参考的人-物中心视频个性化任务。通过全局多模态引导和模态参考嵌入，有效对齐MLLM特征与VAE令牌，实现高保真度和精确交互。实验表明HOMIE在多种任务上达到最优。
items.abstract: Human-object centric video personalization (HOCVP) is a core task within subject-driven video generation. However, existing methods suffer from two key limitations. First, most approaches focusing on inter-subject personalization still struggle to strike a balance between high subject fidelity and accurate interaction patterns between humans and diverse objects, especially when objects represent abstract concepts such as logos. Second, while intra-subject references (e.g., OCR maps, multi-view inputs) are expected…
keyFacts: 如何在人-物中心视频个性化中同时保证高主体保真度和准确的人-物交互？
提出HOMIE框架，利用全局多模态引导对齐MLLM特征与VAE令牌，并使用模态参考嵌入区分不同来源的令牌。
在各种HOCVP任务上实现了最优性能。
items.why: 该研究与计算机视觉相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。
items.peerReviewStatus: 预印本 · 未经 arXiv 同行评审

items.method: 提出HOMIE框架，利用全局多模态引导对齐MLLM特征与VAE令牌，并使用模态参考嵌入区分不同来源的令牌。
items.findings: 在各种HOCVP任务上实现了最优性能。

items.title: QIRF：量子启发的非正交函数空间压缩用于3D高斯泼溅
items.originalTitle: QIRF Quantum-Inspired Non-Orthogonal Function-Space Compression for 3D Gaussian Splatting
items.summary: 本文提出QIRF，一种量子启发的非正交函数空间压缩方法，通过分析高斯重叠矩阵和辐射响应密度矩阵进行子空间选择，平均减少71.7%的高斯数量和存储，PSNR提升0.10 dB，渲染速度提升34.3%。
items.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves high-quality real-time rendering by representing a scene with a large collection of anisotropic Gaussian primitives. However, complex scenes often require millions of Gaussians, resulting in substantial storage and rendering costs. Existing compression methods mainly reduce redundancy through primitive-wise pruning, attribute quantization, clustering, or neural coding, while redundancy caused by strongly overlapping and non-orthogonal Gaussian basis functions remains largely u…
keyFacts: 如何压缩3D高斯泼溅中因强重叠和非正交基础函数导致的冗余？
构建高斯重叠矩阵和辐射响应密度矩阵，使用广义特征分解识别主导局部子空间并选择代表性高斯，配合细节感知保护。
在13个场景上平均减少71.7%的高斯数量，PSNR提高0.10 dB，渲染速度提升34.3%。
items.why: 该研究与计算机视觉相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。
items.peerReviewStatus: 预印本 · 未经 arXiv 同行评审
items.question: 如何压缩3D高斯泼溅中因强重叠和非正交基础函数导致的冗余？
items.method: 构建高斯重叠矩阵和辐射响应密度矩阵，使用广义特征分解识别主导局部子空间并选择代表性高斯，配合细节感知保护。
items.findings: 在13个场景上平均减少71.7%的高斯数量，PSNR提高0.10 dB，渲染速度提升34.3%。

items.title: FlowMimic：基于像素对扭曲流场的无掩码视频编辑与生成
items.originalTitle: FlowMimic: Mask-free Visual Editing and Generation with Pixel-pair Warped Flow Field for Online Video Editing Data Generation and Modality Mimicry
items.summary: 本文提出像素对时间扭曲流场，直接从图像编辑样本生成视频编辑样本，无需掩码。通过模态模仿损失对齐图像和视频模态的分布，并引入感知任务使模型内化编辑指令理解能力，无需外部辅助。
items.abstract: In line with the prevailing direction of vision research, we explore the integration of both generation and editing capabilities for video and image modalities within a single model. Current approaches to collecting video editing data typically depend on labour-intensive, time-consuming curated procedures--involving object mask annotation, the use of error-introducing pair synthesis via I2V model and ControlNet-like guidance, and VLM-based quality filtering or refinement--and demonstrate limited task scalability…
keyFacts: 如何在不依赖人工掩码标注的情况下实现视频编辑数据的自动生成并统一图像与视频模态？
开发像素对时间扭曲流场生成视频编辑样本，设计模态模仿生成损失和编辑损失对齐模态分布，引入感知任务。
模型仅使用生成的数据即可学习视频编辑，并在多个视频编辑任务上展示有效性。
items.why: 该研究与计算机视觉相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。
items.peerReviewStatus: 预印本 · 未经 arXiv 同行评审

items.method: 开发像素对时间扭曲流场生成视频编辑样本，设计模态模仿生成损失和编辑损失对齐模态分布，引入感知任务。
items.findings: 模型仅使用生成的数据即可学习视频编辑，并在多个视频编辑任务上展示有效性。

items.title: 鲁棒的多模态动态物体分割
items.originalTitle: Robust Multimodal Dynamic Object Segmentation
items.summary: 本文提出一个动态物体分割框架，融合2D点轨迹、3D重建和语义等多模态线索，采用Transformer与特征聚类聚合模块进行静态/动态分类，并引入基于点查询的SAM后处理方法处理多个物体。实验达到动态分割和静态重建的最优性能。
items.abstract: Dynamic object segmentation plays a critical role in many visual applications such as static scene reconstruction from dynamic videos. However, existing optical flow-based methods fail to ensure consistent static/dynamic segmentation along object boundaries, while 3D reconstruction-based approaches are highly sensitive to reconstruction errors. To address these limitations, we present a dynamic object segmentation framework that can generate both precise and complete dynamic masks by integrating multimodal cues in…
keyFacts: 如何克服光流法和3D重建方法在动态物体分割中的边界一致性和对重建误差敏感的问题？
设计网络结合Transformer和特征聚类聚合模块，融合2D点轨迹、3D重建和语义等多模态特征轨迹进行分类。
在动态物体分割和静态场景重建任务上均达到最优性能。
items.why: 该研究与计算机视觉相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。
items.peerReviewStatus: 预印本 · 未经 arXiv 同行评审

items.method: 设计网络结合Transformer和特征聚类聚合模块，融合2D点轨迹、3D重建和语义等多模态特征轨迹进行分类。
items.findings: 在动态物体分割和静态场景重建任务上均达到最优性能。

items.title: 全光凝聚：一种新的通用场景重建方法
items.originalTitle: Plenoptic Condensation: A Novel Approach to Generalized Scene Reconstruction
items.summary: 本文提出全光凝聚(PCon)方法，通过多阶段重建管道，将图像转化为低能力场景元素并自适应凝聚为高能力结构化元素，实现可变表示能力。在“受损菲亚特”案例中，PCon的重建精度是现有方法的两倍以上，局部损伤误差仅35微米。
items.abstract: We present a novel Generalized Scene Reconstruction (GSR) approach called Plenoptic Condensation (PCon). PCon uses a multi-stage reconstruction pipeline, initially converting images into "soupy" scene elements with low (representational) power, then adaptively condensing the "soup" into "structured" elements of higher power capable of efficiently representing, for example, sharp edges and smooth reflective surfaces. PCon scene models called Reality Models (Relms) enable spatially varying representational power, wh…
keyFacts: 如何实现具有可变表示能力的高保真通用场景重建？
多阶段重建管道：将图像转化为低能力“汤”元素，然后自适应凝聚为高能力结构化元素。
PCon在“受损菲亚特”案例中车头重建精度是SOTA方法的两倍以上，局部损伤误差35微米，而其他方法基本无法测量。
items.why: 该研究与计算机视觉相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。
items.peerReviewStatus: 预印本 · 未经 arXiv 同行评审
items.question: 如何实现具有可变表示能力的高保真通用场景重建？
items.method: 多阶段重建管道：将图像转化为低能力“汤”元素，然后自适应凝聚为高能力结构化元素。
items.findings: PCon在“受损菲亚特”案例中车头重建精度是SOTA方法的两倍以上，局部损伤误差35微米，而其他方法基本无法测量。

items.title: Lossless-INR：无损体积隐式神经表示
items.originalTitle: Lossless-INR: Lossless Volumetric Implicit Neural Representations
items.summary: 本文提出Lossless-INR，基于位平面分解的免损体积隐式表示框架，将重建转化为逐位二分类，结合八叉树分区和三元特征网格网络，实现零比特错误率和精确重建。实验在多种体积数据集上展示了紧凑表示的忠实渲染。
items.abstract: Implicit neural representation (INR) methods provide continuous coordinate-to-value mappings and integrate naturally with direct volume rendering, making them attractive for representing volumetric data. However, existing INR-based approaches for volumetric data are inherently lossy, and even small reconstruction errors can propagate through rendering and downstream analysis. In this work, we explore Lossless-INR, a lossless INR framework for 3D scientific volumetric data based on bit-plane decomposition. By decom…
keyFacts: 如何实现3D科学体积数据的无损隐式神经表示？
基于位平面分解将重建转化为二分类，结合八叉树自适应分区和三元特征网格网络。
实现零比特错误率和完全精确重建，支持忠实渲染和下游分析。
items.why: 该研究与计算机视觉相关；结论仍需结合完整论文、实验设置与后续同行评审判断。
items.peerReviewStatus: 预印本 · 未经 arXiv 同行评审
items.question: 如何实现3D科学体积数据的无损隐式神经表示？
items.method: 基于位平面分解将重建转化为二分类，结合八叉树自适应分区和三元特征网格网络。
items.findings: 实现零比特错误率和完全精确重建，支持忠实渲染和下游分析。

items.title: Occlusion-Aware Panoptic Segmentation with Joint Position Embedding and Occlusion-Level Attention
items.originalTitle: Occlusion-Aware Panoptic Segmentation with Joint Position Embedding and Occlusion-Level Attention
items.summary: Panoptic segmentation in complex scenes remains challenging because of occlusions, yet modern approaches often neglect occlusion modelling. In this paper, we propose \textbf{P}osition \textbf{E}mbedding \textbf{M}odulation with \textbf{O}cclusion-\textbf{L}evel \textbf{A}ttention (PEMOLA), a novel occlusion-aware module that can be seamlessly integrated into transformer-based panoptic segmentation. To obtain occlusion cues, we train an occlusion classifier on the COCO-OLAC dataset. The classifier derives the occlu…

items.title: SpEmoC: A Balanced Speaker-Segment Multimodal Emotion Benchmark
items.originalTitle: SpEmoC: A Balanced Speaker-Segment Multimodal Emotion Benchmark
items.summary: Understanding human emotions in spoken conversations is a key challenge in affective computing, with applications in empathetic AI, human computer interaction, and mental health monitoring. However, existing datasets vary in scale, emotion distribution, modality alignment, and data partitioning strategies, which can influence reliable cross-dataset generalization and minority-emotion modeling. We introduce SpEmoC a Speaking segment Emotion for Conversations comprising 306,544 raw clips from 3,100 English language…

items.title: VGOcc: Learning Visual-Geometric Gaussians for Vision-Centric 3D Driving Occupancy Prediction
items.originalTitle: VGOcc: Learning Visual-Geometric Gaussians for Vision-Centric 3D Driving Occupancy Prediction
items.summary: Vision-only occupancy prediction requires recovering a semantic 3D occupancy field from calibrated surround-view images, where each view provides observations with ambiguous depth along camera rays. Existing methods have progressed from dense structured representations to sparse Gaussian primitives, improving the efficiency of 3D scene representation. However, Gaussian learning still relies primarily on image domain features, which provide limited explicit geometric information for volumetric reasoning. Our key ob…

items.title: Co-addition and Subtraction of Undersampled Images
items.originalTitle: Co-addition and Subtraction of Undersampled Images
items.summary: In astronomical imaging surveys, repeated observations of the same sky patches are taken in order to obtain deeper images and detect new sources. This is the case in the search for many transient phenomena, such as supernovae, gravitational wave (GW) optical counterparts and other cataclysmic variables. In many such surveys some of the images are undersampled, meaning that the pixel size is too large, and the image suffers from aliasing. For undersampled images, both co-addition of the images and background subtra…
